title: fix(deps): update module github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/v8 to v8.2.0
body:

### Release Notes

<details>
<summary>checkpoint-restore/go-criu (github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/v8)</summary>

### [`v8.2.0`](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/releases/tag/v8.2.0)

[Compare Source](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/compare/v8.1.0...v8.2.0)

#### What's Changed

- readme: update release version by [@​rst0git](https://redirect.github.com/rst0git) in [#​221](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/221)
- build(deps): bump golang.org/x/sys from 0.39.0 to 0.40.0 in the all group by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​222](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/222)
- Move contribution guidelines to CONTRIBUTING.md by [@​adrianreber](https://redirect.github.com/adrianreber) in [#​227](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/227)
- dependabot: add github-actions and switch to weekly by [@​adrianreber](https://redirect.github.com/adrianreber) in [#​226](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/226)
- ci: update different github action actions by [@​adrianreber](https://redirect.github.com/adrianreber) in [#​225](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/225)
- build(deps): bump DavidAnson/markdownlint-cli2-action from 9 to 22 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​228](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/228)
- build(deps): bump actions/setup-go from 5 to 6 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​230](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/230)
- build(deps): bump actions/checkout from 3 to 6 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​232](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/232)
- build(deps): bump codecov/codecov-action from 4 to 5 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​231](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/231)
- Fix InheritFd by passing fds via cmd.ExtraFiles by [@​dfeigin-nv](https://redirect.github.com/dfeigin-nv) in [#​224](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/224)
- build(deps): bump github/codeql-action from 2 to 4 by [@​dependabot](https://redirect.github.com/dependabot)\[bot] in [#​233](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/233)
- Update version in README.md to 8.2.0 by [@​adrianreber](https://redirect.github.com/adrianreber) in [#​234](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/234)

#### New Contributors

- [@​dfeigin-nv](https://redirect.github.com/dfeigin-nv) made their first contribution in [#​224](https://redirect.github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/pull/224)

**Full Changelog**: <https://github.com/checkpoint-restore/go-criu/compare/v8.1.0...v8.2.0>

</details>
